title: The Fabric
overview: 1000 years ago at Wiang Chai Chet Buri Prince Rangsiman Organized a weaving competition to choose one of the brides to be the queen of the throne, but Hom Nuan from Nakhon Pha Ngam was strangled to death during weaving. Leaving only silk marks on the neck and unable to know who did it.
